description: You can execute these commands from the Cortex CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.

outputs.description: Email message id in internet. CheckPointHEC.Entity.subject Email subject.
outputs.name: CheckPointHEC.Entity.internetMessageId

outputs.description: Datetime email was received in iso 8601 format. CheckPointHEC.Entity.size Email size.
outputs.name: CheckPointHEC.Entity.received

outputs.description: Links in email. CheckPointHEC.Entity.attachmentCount Number of attachments in email.
outputs.name: CheckPointHEC.Entity.emailLinks

outputs.description: File attachments in email. CheckPointHEC.Entity.mode Internal policy rule.
outputs.name: CheckPointHEC.Entity.attachments

outputs.description: Recipient email addresses. CheckPointHEC.Entity.subject Email subject.
outputs.name: CheckPointHEC.Entity.recipients

outputs.description: Email sender. CheckPointHEC.Entity.fromDomain Domain where the email was sent from.
outputs.name: CheckPointHEC.Entity.fromEmail

outputs.description: Sender user details. CheckPointHEC.Entity.fromName Sender name.
outputs.name: CheckPointHEC.Entity.fromUser

outputs.description: Email main recipients. CheckPointHEC.Entity.toUser User details for main recipients.
outputs.name: CheckPointHEC.Entity.to

outputs.description: Email carbon copy recipients. CheckPointHEC.Entity.ccUser User details for carbon copy recipients.
outputs.name: CheckPointHEC.Entity.cc

outputs.description: Email blind carbon copy recipients. CheckPointHEC.Entity.bccUser User details for blind carbon copy recipients.
outputs.name: CheckPointHEC.Entity.bcc

outputs.description: Email reply. CheckPointHEC.Entity.replyToNickname Email reply nickname.
outputs.name: CheckPointHEC.Entity.replyToEmail

outputs.description: Email has been read. CheckPointHEC.Entity.isDeleted Email has been deleted.
outputs.name: CheckPointHEC.Entity.isRead

outputs.description: Email is from external organization. CheckPointHEC.Entity.isInternal Email is from same organization.
outputs.name: CheckPointHEC.Entity.isIncoming

outputs.description: Email is to an external organization. CheckPointHEC.Entity.isQuarantined Email has been quarantined.
outputs.name: CheckPointHEC.Entity.isOutgoing

outputs.description: Email is a notification of another quarantined email. CheckPointHEC.Entity.isRestored Email is restored from quarantine.
outputs.name: CheckPointHEC.Entity.isQuarantineNotification

outputs.description: Email is a request to restore. CheckPointHEC.Entity.isRestoreDeclined Email is a declined restore request.
outputs.name: CheckPointHEC.Entity.isRestoreRequested

outputs.description: Spam verdict. CheckPointHEC.Entity.SpfResult Sender Policy Framework check result.
outputs.name: CheckPointHEC.Entity.saasSpamVerdict

outputs.description: Restore request datetime in iso 8601 format. Edit this page Report an Issue
outputs.name: CheckPointHEC.Entity.restoreRequestTime

outputs.name: Previous
